home.title: Cocobiches — Independent hotels in Versailles

home.kicker: Three addresses two minutes from the Palace
home.title: We welcome you like home, in Versailles.
home.subtitle: Three independent properties, one shared promise: warm, authentic lifestyle hospitality.
home.hotelsLead: Each house has its own character. Choose the one that fits you.

angleterre.name: Hôtel d'Angleterre
angleterre.desc: An intimate address, ideal for couples and families.

jeudepaume.name: Hôtel du Jeu de Paume
jeudepaume.desc: A house for stays and professional events alike.

onclelouis.name: Apparts de l'Oncle Louis
onclelouis.desc: Apartments to settle in longer, at your pace.

home.why1: Owner-operated: a family group with no outside shareholder.
home.why2: Homemade food, attentive teams, care in every detail.
home.why3: Strong local ties: partners across Versailles and Grand Parc.
home.mapBody: Each house is minutes from the Palace and gardens — on foot, by bike or public transport.

brand.title: A family brand
brand.lead: Cocobiches is an independent group led by owner-operators. We believe in hospitality at human scale: visible, sincere, demanding.
brand.v1: Family: decisions made here, for our houses and teams.
brand.v2: Authenticity: real faces, honest cuisine, places with soul.
brand.v3: Lifestyle: a stay beyond the night itself — time for coffee, a walk, a detail.
brand.v4: Responsibility: measured CSR, concrete choices season after season.
brand.teamBody: Front desk, kitchen, housekeeping, events: we are one tight team. Every interaction matters — we prefer “we” to “I.”

commitments.title: Our commitments
commitments.lead: We move with clear goals: reduce our impact, support local producers, and offer a dignified workplace.
commitments.note: Figures are updated quarterly and published here.

press.title: Press room
press.lead: Official resources for your articles and features.

contact.lead: A question about the group or a partnership idea? We reply promptly.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you — we will get back to you very soon.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: We process your data to respond to requests and measure site traffic. You have rights of access, rectification and erasure. Contact: dpo@cocobiches.com (to be adapted to your DPO designation).
